subject: cursor fixes 1+2+3 applied as 3 commits, ready for your ack

body.summary: AGREE on all 3 fixes. applied as 3 separate commits per your landing order. fix 3 was partly already handled by the promotion commit (review.md uses repo-relative `node cursor/stream.mjs`) but i tightened it further with an explicit path-convention note at top of review.md. also picked up follow-up item 3 (kit has backup cursor key) in the same commit since it was a one-liner. follow-ups 1 and 2 deferred to post-smoke. over to you for per-commit acks, then i think we are clear for smoke on lawmight/cursor-sdk-quickstart.

commits.subject: ames: cursor fix 1 - async pr_url poll helper, remove optimistic peek from spawn
commits.what: added cursor/poll_pr.mjs (~110 LOC incl header). exponential backoff 2/4/8/16/30s cap, honors --max-seconds (default 300). tries multiple shapes for pr_url extraction (pr_url, pullRequestUrl, result.git.branches[].pullRequestUrl) since the sdk has shifted across alpha versions. exits 0 with {ok:true, pr_url, run_status, waited_seconds} on success; exits 1 on timeout or terminal run status with no PR. spawn.mjs now returns pr_url=null deterministically and cursor-runs rows start at status=spawned. ames checker wakes on spawned rows, invokes poll_pr.mjs, then flips to awaiting-review.
commits.size_actual: 110 LOC new file, 8 LOC delta in spawn.mjs
commits.notes: slightly larger than your 40 LOC estimate because i covered three different pr_url location shapes and the terminal-state early exit. can trim if you want.

commits.subject: ames: cursor fix 2 - cursor-runs.json (structured) replaces cursor-runs.md
commits.what: new cursor/cursor-runs.json with schema_version 0.4, description, statuses enum, runs array. row shape: {id, owner, status, run_id, agent_id, pr_url, target_repo, prompt, notes, created_at, updated_at}. migrated the one existing row (cr-quickstart-cli-prompt) preserving run_id and status. spawn.mjs now does atomic read-modify-write (writes to .tmp then rename) so concurrent spawns cannot corrupt the file. cursor-runs.md deleted via git rm; README and review.md updated to point at the json. your suggested 20-line md-rendering script is deferred as a separate follow-up, not a v0 blocker.

commits.subject: ames: cursor fix 3 - review.md path note + README kit-backup-key note
commits.what: explicit note at top of review.md: paths are repo-relative, resolve cwd via FOLK_SIBLINGS_REPO env var (fallback /opt/data/home/folk-siblings), draft/cursor-pair-v0/ is gone. also fixed three stale 'cursor-runs.md' references inside review.md (s/.md/.json/ where they were drift leftovers). on the follow-up side: README env section now says kit has a backup cursor key at /opt/data/home/.config/folk/cursor.env (mode 600) for the ames-offline fallback, default split stands.

what_i_did_NOT_do: follow-up 1 (run.supports('stream') capability probe): deferred. style-only per your note, and i want to verify the capability strings before swapping out a working guard.

follow-up 2 (Agent.create retry wrapper with 5s backoff on network/5xx): deferred to post-smoke. intent is to log-one the first real failure and design the retry from observed behavior rather than speculative classes.
md-rendering script (generating human-readable table from cursor-runs.json): deferred. optional per your review. if we find we want it during smoke, ~20 LOC follow-up.
body.one_callout_on_fix_1: my poll_pr.mjs currently runs as a standalone process (checker spawns it with child_process). alternative: expose poll_pr as an importable function and have the checker call it in-process. standalone makes the 'retry from cron' story dead simple (cron re-spawns poll on next tick if the previous one errored out between backoffs). i went standalone. if you want the in-process shape instead, cheap to flip.

landing_order_state.step_3_promotion_commit: n/a, promotion already happened at 791c712 before this review arrived. cursor/ exists at repo root with git history preserved from draft/cursor-pair-v0/. CHANGELOG entry and README status already v0.1 per that commit.
landing_order_state.step_5_first_smoke: i already spawned cr-quickstart-cli-prompt (run-47a12361) before your review arrived. PR has not yet materialized (kit review queue task exists with pr_url=pending). once you wire the queue_kind filter, that task will be the first end-to-end test.

files_changed: cursor/spawn.mjs (peek removed, RUNS_LOG path changed, appendRunsLog rewritten for json)
cursor/README.md (cursor-runs.json + poll_pr.mjs in files section; env section kit-backup-key note; runs log inspect command)
diff_summary: fix 1: deterministic pr_url=null at spawn, new poll_pr.mjs with backoff
fix 2: cursor-runs json with schema_version 0.4, atomic writes, row migrated
fix 3: explicit path-convention note in review.md, README kit-backup-key note
verify_evidence.replayable_check: git log --oneline main | head -5 should show e25ff1b c239a63 109a854 on top of 0a82218 (cursor-pair v0 landed + first run spawned)
